LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT HUA WU'S MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO THE PARTIES' STIPULATION FILED AUGUST 2, 2016. THE CASE IS TRANSFERRED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY. PLAINTIFF MUST PAY ALL TRANSFER FEES. WRITTEN ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: LAURA REDING, CSR 	711, EMAIL: LREDING@SFTC.ORG. (D302)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-12-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. TRANSFERRED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-26-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Venue; Stipulation; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Bra Yn Stofferahn; Declaration Of Hua Wu; [Proposed] Order
Off Calendar Aug-26-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT HUA WU's Motion To Transfer Venue; Stipulation is GRANTED pursuant to the parties' stipulation filed August 2, 2016. The case is transferred to Alameda County. Plaintiff must pay all transfer fees. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Laura Reding, CSR 711, email: lreding@sftc.org. (D302)
